title: pgstat — Database & Tables
description: Per-database TPS, tup_returned/fetched, conflict; tablo bazli buyume ve top sorgu istatistikleri.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select count(distinct dbid) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes'
select coalesce(sum(conflicts_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(deadlocks_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(temp_files_delta), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)

select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), datname as metric, sum(xact_commit_delta + xact_rollback_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as value from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1, datname order by 1

panels.title: Tup Returned vs Fetched (per DB toplam)

targets.rawSql: select $__timeGroupAlias(sample_ts, $__interval), sum(tup_returned_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as "tup_returned", sum(tup_fetched_delta)::float / nullif(extract(epoch from '$__interval'::interval), 0) as "tup_fetched" from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by 1 order by 1

select datname as database, sum(xact_commit_delta) as commits, sum(xact_rollback_delta) as rollbacks, sum(tup_inserted_delta) as inserts, sum(tup_updated_delta) as updates, sum(tup_deleted_delta) as deletes, sum(tup_returned_delta) as returned, sum(blks_read_delta) * 8192 as disk_read, round(100.0 * sum(blks_hit_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(blks_hit_delta + blks_read_delta), 0), 1) as cache_hit_pct, sum(temp_bytes_delta) as temp_bytes, sum(deadlocks_delta) as deadlocks, sum(conflicts_delta) as conflicts from fact.pg_database_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by datname order by commits desc nulls last

select schemaname || '.' || relname as relation, sum(n_tup_ins_delta) as inserts, sum(n_tup_upd_delta) as updates, sum(n_tup_del_delta) as deletes, sum(n_tup_hot_upd_delta) as hot_updates, sum(seq_scan_delta) as seq_scans, sum(idx_scan_delta) as idx_scans from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by schemaname, relname having sum(n_tup_ins_delta + n_tup_upd_delta + n_tup_del_delta) > 0 order by sum(n_tup_ins_delta + n_tup_upd_delta + n_tup_del_delta) desc nulls last limit 30
